/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared  -o libmpdlistenplugin.so CMakeFiles/mpdlistenplugin.dir/mpdlistenplugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpdlistenplugin.dir/mpdlistenplugin_com_pioki_jukebox_backendPlugin.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN" libmpdlisten.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
